extraction.one_line_summary: MYLETSKOV Jakob took his 12th career Tour of Hainan stage win in a sprint finish, holding off MARINI and PADALKA.
tactical_patterns: Stage 1 breakaway with Hill, Vanhove, King-Lok, Pasher, Vitiligo failed despite wet conditions reducing peloton chase capacity.
Maricka with 10 prior stage wins lost leadout discipline, allowing teammate Marini to steal Stage 1 victory.
WINNER and Unitedhealthcare attempted attacks on Stage 3 to split group but terrain too flat for separation.

rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: positive: Won Stage 1 despite riding for contract under pressure, outsprinted established Maricka in final meters
rider_signals.HILL Ben: positive: Consistently infiltrated early breakaways across multiple stages including Stage 1, collecting bonus seconds strategically
rider_signals.MARICKA: negative: Lost Stage 1 despite 10 prior wins and full leadout train when compatriot Marini came past
rider_signals.VANHOVE: negative: Wore leader's jersey on Stage 1 but faded in sprint despite moving up with 5km to go
rider_signals.MYLETSKOV Jakob: positive: Dominated tour history with 7 wins in early editions, now 12 total including Stage 3 sprint
